The [[Tykannin Drive]] '''''Redthorn''-class scout''' was a 24-meter long design with a forward light triple blaster. It carried one pilot, one co-pilot, one gunner, and 10 metric tons of cargo. The [[Lwyll (Redthorn-class)|''Lwyll'']] was an example of this class.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
